description:

Verification:
- Tests to pass: existing test/specled_ex/realization/hash_store_test.exs continues to pass.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: at least one new test in hash_store_test.exs (or a smoke test in a new test file) uses StateJsonFixture to seed and read state.json contents in a tmp root.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/**
- .spec/**
- priv/**
Allowed touches:
- test/test_support/state_json_fixture.ex
- mix.exs (elixirc_paths only)
- test/test_helper.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- No production code changes.
- No modification of HashStore semantics (that's S1).
- No modification of existing test fixtures.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
